title: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing merchandising in favor of Rebuild
display_title: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing merchandising in favor of Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Charizard » Mon Jan 23, 2017 2:51 am Does Rebuild appeal more to casual audiences? It seems like Khara's trying to push it as the new "definitive" version of the franchise, especially 2.0 which is the most popular of the Rebuild movies; at least the movies are good (unlike say the Star Wars prequels which were treated similarly in their heyday) and a lot of fans prefer them, but Rebuild still can't hold a candle to the impact and popularity that the original TV show had.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Mon Jan 23, 2017 3:04 am Well I'd say that it's most likely because the Rebuilds are the newest and most current project so it makes more sense for them to push those over anything else at this point in time. They want to make sure the Rebuilds are the ones that people are thinking of right now when they think of anything Evangelion, so that when people pick up merch they'll see the name of the film of the 3.0 and go "Oh yeah, there is another one to come"

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Charizard » Mon Jan 23, 2017 3:16 am jcmoorehead wrote: Well I'd say that it's most likely because the Rebuilds are the newest and most current project so it makes more sense for them to push those over anything else at this point in time. They want to make sure the Rebuilds are the ones that people are thinking of right now when they think of anything Evangelion, so that when people pick up merch they'll see the name of the film of the 3.0 and go "Oh yeah, there is another one to come"

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 23, 2017 3:51 am There's also the fact that NGE isn't an original Khara property; it was originally produced by Gainax. Khara only somewhat recently acquired the full rights to the original series.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Charizard » Mon Jan 23, 2017 3:57 am Sachi wrote: There's also the fact that NGE isn't an original Khara property; it was originally produced by Gainax. Khara only somewhat recently acquired the full rights to the original series.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 23, 2017 3:58 am Is there any piece of NGE merchandise that hasn't been made yet that still needs to be made? Aside from the Shamshel dildo, of course.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Stillborn » Mon Jan 23, 2017 4:29 am Reichu wrote: Aside from the Shamshel dildo, of course.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Jan 26, 2017 5:49 pm Reichu wrote: Is there any piece of NGE merchandise that hasn't been made yet that still needs to be made? Aside from the Shamshel dildo, of course.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Jan 26, 2017 8:03 pm Chuckman presents: VideodREIome Lifesize doll. Yours for only 69 payments of $69.69

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Director Black » Thu Jan 26, 2017 9:38 pm Reichu wrote: Is there any piece of NGE merchandise that hasn't been made yet that still needs to be made? Aside from the Shamshel dildo, of course.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Fri Jan 27, 2017 6:59 am Reichu wrote: Is there any piece of NGE merchandise that hasn't been made yet that still needs to be made? Aside from the Shamshel dildo, of course.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by BiQ » Wed Feb 01, 2017 5:14 pm Reichu wrote: Is there any piece of NGE merchandise that hasn't been made yet that still needs to be made? Aside from the Shamshel dildo, of course.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by RadicalRandy » Wed Feb 01, 2017 5:23 pm I feel as if a Zeruel toilet-paper dispenser would be much more appropriate, given that his arms are basically toilet-paper.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by BiQ » Wed Feb 01, 2017 5:28 pm Whhaaat... My mind is getting mushy. I honestly double-checked the name before writing it but it still came out like that. Zeruel, of course. Sry. I'll blame it on being on a phone and with a serious case of sleep deprivation due to recently becoming a dad. Yeah, that's it.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by RadicalRandy » Wed Feb 01, 2017 9:44 pm You've recently become a father? In that case: Congratulations! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Director Black » Thu Feb 02, 2017 7:42 pm BiQ wrote: I could not find Ramiel toilet paper dispenser just now... My life is not complete without one...

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Feb 02, 2017 10:02 pm That's because you should be looking for a Ramiel bidet.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Director Black » Sat Feb 11, 2017 1:32 am NemZ wrote: That's because you should be looking for a Ramiel bidet.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sat Feb 11, 2017 7:03 am I'd rather Ramiel got made into, you know, an actual drill. Or a microwave. Or a speaker. Or all three.

[]: Re: Why has Khara completely abandoned NGE in marketing/merchandising in favor of Rebuild?             Quote Post by Director Black » Sat Feb 11, 2017 1:23 pm How about Ramiel's screams being used in place of an airhorn?
